capabilities.name: Website Builder & Pages
capabilities.description: Create, edit, and publish website pages using the Odoo website builder and manage website menus.
examples: Create a new landing page with a hero snippet
Add a page to the website menu
Configure page visibility and publishing date

capabilities.name: Themes & Snippets
capabilities.description: Install and customize themes, brand colors, fonts, and extend the snippet library.
examples: Install and switch a theme
Customize the theme color palette
Add a custom snippet to the snippet bar

capabilities.name: E-Commerce Product Pages
capabilities.description: Publish products, configure variants, filters, categories, and upsell blocks on the website.
examples: Publish a product to the e-commerce catalog
Configure product attributes and variants
Add alternative products to a product page

capabilities.name: Cart & Checkout
capabilities.description: Configure shopping cart, payment providers, delivery methods, and checkout flow.
examples: Enable a payment provider
Configure delivery methods by country
Customize the cart page

capabilities.name: Blog & Content
capabilities.description: Create and manage blogs, posts, categories, authors, and publishing schedules.
examples: Create a blog post and schedule publishing
Add tags and categories to posts
Display latest posts on the homepage

capabilities.name: SEO & Metadata
capabilities.description: Optimize pages for search engines with meta tags, slugs, sitemap, and social sharing.
examples: Set SEO metadata for a page
Generate a sitemap.xml
Configure Open Graph tags for social sharing

capabilities.name: Portal & Customer Account
capabilities.description: Configure portal users, access to orders, invoices, projects, and account profile pages.
examples: Enable portal access for a customer
Customize the customer account dashboard
Show order history in the portal

capabilities.name: OWL Frontend Components
capabilities.description: Build and customize OWL-based public components, interactions, and editor integrations.
examples: Create an OWL component for a product configurator
Register a public widget for dynamic content
Add a frontend asset bundle

capabilities.name: Website Forms & Lead Capture
capabilities.description: Create forms that generate CRM leads, support tickets, or subscriptions from website visitors.
examples: Build a contact form on a landing page
Route form submissions to the CRM pipeline
Add hidden UTM fields to a form
